questions.prompt: Dosing tank shall have a capacity equal to of the interior capacity of the pipe to be dosed at one time
questions.explanation_short: d . 90% 100% When the quantity of sewage exceeds the amount that can be disposed in 152.4 lineal meter
questions.explanation_long: d . 90% 100% When the quantity of sewage exceeds the amount that can be disposed in 152.4 lineal meter of each line, a dosing tank shall be used. Dosing tanks shall be equipped with an automatic siphon or pump which discharges the tank once every three (3) or four (4) hours. The tank shal have a capacity equal to sixty (60) to seventy-five (75) percent of the interior capacity of the pipe to be dosed at one time. Where the total length of pipe exceeds 304.8 lineal meter, the dosing tank shall be provided with two (2) siphons or pumps dosing alternately and each serving one-half (1/2) of the leach field.
